# This test demonstrates the general case that still needs work: heterogeneous
# CPU capacities without constraints can leave higher-vCPU nodes underutilized.
# MMA balances absolute CPU load across stores, which results in uneven CPU
# utilization when per-node capacities differ and replicas can move freely.
gen_cluster nodes=4 region=(a,b) nodes_per_region=(2,2) node_cpu_cores=(4,4,12,12)
----

setting split_queue_enabled=false
----

gen_ranges ranges=40 min_key=0 max_key=10000 placement_type=even
----

gen_load rate=12000 rw_ratio=1 min_key=0 max_key=10000 request_cpu_per_access=1000000
----
12.00 access-vcpus

assertion type=balance stat=cpu_util upper_bound=1.1 ticks=6
----
asserting: max_{stores}(cpu_util)/mean_{stores}(cpu_util) ≤ 1.10 at each of last 6 ticks

eval duration=6m samples=1 seed=42 cfgs=(mma-count) metrics=(cpu,cpu_util,replicas,leases)
----
cpu#1: last:  [s1=2400641666, s2=2403058333, s3=3595617819, s4=3596894817] (stddev=597203941.12, mean=2999053158.75, sum=11996212635)
cpu#1: thrash_pct: [s1=19%, s2=17%, s3=66%, s4=69%]  (sum=170%)
cpu_util#1: last:  [s1=0.60, s2=0.60, s3=0.30, s4=0.30] (stddev=0.15, mean=0.45, sum=2)
cpu_util#1: thrash_pct: [s1=14%, s2=13%, s3=16%, s4=17%]  (sum=61%)
leases#1: first: [s1=10, s2=10, s3=10, s4=10] (stddev=0.00, mean=10.00, sum=40)
leases#1: last:  [s1=8, s2=8, s3=12, s4=12] (stddev=2.00, mean=10.00, sum=40)
leases#1: thrash_pct: [s1=0%, s2=0%, s3=45%, s4=45%]  (sum=90%)
replicas#1: first: [s1=30, s2=30, s3=30, s4=30] (stddev=0.00, mean=30.00, sum=120)
replicas#1: last:  [s1=30, s2=30, s3=30, s4=30] (stddev=0.00, mean=30.00, sum=120)
replicas#1: thrash_pct: [s1=0%, s2=0%, s3=0%, s4=0%]  (sum=0%)
artifacts[mma-count]: e22c490133c454f0
failed assertion sample 1
  balance stat=cpu_util threshold=(≤1.10) ticks=6
	max/mean=1.33 tick=0
	max/mean=1.33 tick=1
	max/mean=1.33 tick=2
	max/mean=1.33 tick=3
	max/mean=1.33 tick=4
	max/mean=1.33 tick=5
